# Slideshot Agent Skills

This is the agent skill repository for [Slideshot](https://slideshot.ai/). Slideshot is an agent-first API that allows you to record polished demo videos from text descriptions directly from your AI agent of choice (Claude, Codex, Cursor, etc.).

## Example demo videos generated by Slideshot:

### Product Hunt demo
https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/cfd3def0-530e-4146-a87a-52fca648c77e

> Prompt: Open search, search for the product called "Arcmark", then click to open it and then click the Visit Website button from the Arcmark product page.

### Notion demo
https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/a088e874-49b9-407c-a0b2-dbfe2124b18a

> Prompt: Login, then find the Notion AI menu in the sidebar and click on it. Next, execute the request in the input field, and then open the Welcome to Notion page from the sidebar.

## What's in this repo?

This repo publishes one canonical skill, `slideshot`, that teaches AI agents how to record product demo videos. The skill works through two runtimes and detects which is available at runtime:

- **MCP runtime** — the hosted Slideshot MCP server (`https://api.slideshot.ai/mcp`, OAuth 2.0). Used inside any host that connects MCP servers.
- **CLI runtime** — the public [`slideshot-cli`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/slideshot-cli) npm package, invoked via `npx -y slideshot-cli`. Used by shell-based agents such as Codex CLI or Cursor when no MCP connection is available.

## Install

Use [npx skills](https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills) to install skills directly:

```bash
npx skills add slideshot/skills

# List available skills
npx skills add slideshot/skills --list
```

### Install via Skillkit

Use [SkillKit](https://github.com/rohitg00/skillkit) to install skills across multiple AI agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, etc.):

```
npx skillkit install slideshot/skills

# List available skills
npx skillkit install slideshot/skills --list
```

### Claude Code (or Claude Desktop)

The plugin install bundles both the MCP server connection and the skill.

```
/plugin marketplace add slideshot/skills
/plugin install slideshot@slideshot-skills
```

After installation, run `/mcp` and complete the OAuth sign-in for the `slideshot` connection.

## Usage

Once installed, just ask your agent to "record product demo videos," and the agent should pick up the Slideshot skill right away.
